sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
SELECT id, zookeeperSessionUptime() AS uptime FROM test_table WHERE uptime > 0;
SELECT id, zookeeperSessionUptime() AS uptime FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE id > 0) AS subquery WHERE uptime > 1;
SELECT id, zookeeperSessionUptime() AS uptime, created_at FROM test_table WHERE zookeeperSessionUptime() > (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table);
SELECT id, zookeeperSessionUptime() AS uptime FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING uptime > (SELECT max(id) FROM test_table);
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, zookeeperSessionUptime() AS uptime FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_table) WHERE id > 0;
SELECT A.id, A.value, zookeeperSessionUptime() AS uptime FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_table) AS A JOIN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE created_at > '2023-01-01') AS B ON A.id > B.id;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (3, 'NULLTest'), (4, NULL);
SELECT id, value, zookeeperSessionUptime() FROM test_table WHERE value > 'test' OR zookeeperSessionUptime() > 0;
